description.value:
A common craftsmanship bionic arm replaces a normal arm in all functionality. Poor craftsmanship arms impose a -5 penalty to Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill tests made with that arm. Good craftsmanship arms grant a +10 bonus to Agility tests involving delicate manipulation. Best craftsmanship arms grant a +10 bonus to Strength tests using the arm and can store small items such as pistol clips.

Damage works as normal, although inappropriate effects like bleeding simply render the limb useless.
description.summary: A bionic arm replaces a normal arm in all functionality, with craftsmanship affecting its performance.

system.effect: A bionic arm replaces a normal arm in all functionality, with craftsmanship affecting its performance.
